name: Exalate
description: Exalate — cross-platform issue sync between Jira, ServiceNow, Zendesk, Salesforce, GitHub. Groovy scripting for bidirectional workflow integrations.

seo.title: Exalate — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Exalate: Exalate — cross-platform issue sync between Jira, ServiceNow, Zendesk, Salesforce, GitHub. Groovy scripting for bidirectional workflow integrations.

when_to_use: Bidirectional Jira-to-ServiceNow issue sync across organizations
Cross-company ticket mirroring with Groovy scripting control
Salesforce-to-Jira case synchronization for support workflows
Integration between GitHub Issues and Jira for dev-ops teams
Custom data mapping in cross-platform issue sync scenarios

pros: Connects Jira, ServiceNow, Zendesk, GitHub together
cons: Groovy knowledge required for advanced setups
Narrow niche outside IT service management
review.verdict: Best-in-class cross-tool sync for support and IT teams; complexity rewards only those who need it.
review.best_for: IT and support teams syncing issues across multiple tracker systems
review.not_for: Teams that only need one-way notifications between simpler tools

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
